metadata.description: GitHub Copilot CLI plugins and playbooks from KevinBrown5280

plugins.name: adversarial-review
plugins.description: Multi-model adversarial code review with 4-way voting reconciliation and cross-session dismissed-findings persistence. Supports review-only and review-and-fix modes.

plugins.name: multi-model-debate
plugins.description: Structured multi-model adversarial debate for high-confidence technical decisions. 4 models debate across rounds with synthesis, consensus detection, and implementation review.
